---
title: "STA314 Project-Cancer Prediction"
output:
  pdf_document: default
  html_document: default
date: "2026-03-07"
---

```{r}
# load training data and classification setup
train <- read.csv("train.csv", check.names = FALSE)

stopifnot("id" %in% names(train))
stopifnot(!anyNA(train))
stopifnot(!anyDuplicated(train$id))

y <- factor(train$cancer)
feature_names <- setdiff(names(train), c("id", "cancer"))
X <- train[, feature_names, drop = FALSE]

x_mat <- as.matrix(X)

class_counts <- table(y)
class_props <- prop.table(class_counts)
```


```{r}
# stratified train validation split
set.seed(314)

p_train <- 0.8

idx_train <- sort(unlist(lapply(levels(y), function(cls) {
  idx <- which(y == cls)
  sample(idx, floor(length(idx) * p_train))
})))

idx_valid <- setdiff(seq_along(y), idx_train)

train_counts <- table(y[idx_train])
valid_counts <- table(y[idx_valid])

train_props <- prop.table(train_counts)
valid_props <- prop.table(valid_counts)

train_counts
valid_counts
round(train_props, 3)
round(valid_props, 3)
```

```{r}
# train: xgboost model evaluation and validation
library(xgboost)

X_train <- x_mat[idx_train, , drop = FALSE]
y_train <- y[idx_train]

X_valid <- x_mat[idx_valid, , drop = FALSE]
y_valid <- y[idx_valid]

label_train <- as.integer(y_train) - 1
label_valid <- as.integer(y_valid) - 1

freq <- table(y_train)
w_class <- sum(freq) / (length(freq) * freq)
w_train <- as.numeric(w_class[as.character(y_train)])

dtrain <- xgb.DMatrix(data = X_train, label = label_train, weight = w_train)
dvalid <- xgb.DMatrix(data = X_valid, label = label_valid)

params <- list(
  objective = "multi:softprob",
  num_class = length(levels(y)),
  eval_metric = "mlogloss",
  max_depth = 4,
  eta = 0.05,
  subsample = 0.8,
  colsample_bytree = 0.5,
  min_child_weight = 5,
  lambda = 1
)

watchlist <- list(train = dtrain, valid = dvalid)

model_xgb <- xgb.train(
  params = params,
  data = dtrain,
  nrounds = 2000,
  watchlist = watchlist,
  early_stopping_rounds = 50,
  verbose = 1
)

prob_valid <- predict(model_xgb, dvalid, reshape = TRUE)

pred_valid_num <- max.col(prob_valid)
pred_valid <- factor(pred_valid_num, levels = 1:length(levels(y)), labels = levels(y))

acc_valid <- mean(pred_valid == y_valid)
cm_valid <- table(True = y_valid, Pred = pred_valid)

acc_valid
cm_valid
model_xgb$best_iteration
model_xgb$best_score
```

```{r}
# xgboost model for test data
test <- read.csv("test.csv", check.names = FALSE)

stopifnot("id" %in% names(test))
stopifnot(!anyNA(test))
stopifnot(!anyDuplicated(test$id))

feature_names <- colnames(x_mat)
stopifnot(all(feature_names %in% names(test)))

X_test <- as.matrix(test[, feature_names, drop = FALSE])

y_all <- y
label_all <- as.integer(y_all) - 1

freq_all <- table(y_all)
w_class <- sum(freq_all) / (length(freq_all) * freq_all)
w_all <- as.numeric(w_class[as.character(y_all)])

dall <- xgb.DMatrix(data = x_mat, label = label_all, weight = w_all)
dtest <- xgb.DMatrix(data = X_test)
# refit xgboost on training data
best_nrounds <- model_xgb$best_iteration
if (is.null(best_nrounds) || is.na(best_nrounds)) best_nrounds <- 300
params <- list(
  objective = "multi:softprob",
  num_class = length(levels(y_all)),
  eval_metric = "mlogloss",
  max_depth = 4,
  eta = 0.05,
  subsample = 0.8,
  colsample_bytree = 0.5,
  min_child_weight = 5,
  lambda = 1
)

final_xgb <- xgb.train(
  params = params,
  data = dall,
  nrounds = best_nrounds,
  verbose = 1
)
# predic test set
prob_test <- predict(final_xgb, dtest, reshape = TRUE)

pred_test_num <- max.col(prob_test)
pred_test <- factor(pred_test_num,
                    levels = 1:length(levels(y_all)),
                    labels = levels(y_all))
# submission file
submission <- data.frame(
  id = test$id,
  cancer = as.integer(as.character(pred_test))
)

write.csv(submission, "submission.csv", row.names = FALSE)

head(submission)
```

```{r}
# evaluation metrics
cm_valid <- table(True = y_valid, Pred = pred_valid)

acc_valid <- mean(pred_valid == y_valid)

tp <- diag(cm_valid)

precision_by_class <- tp / colSums(cm_valid)
recall_by_class <- tp / rowSums(cm_valid)
f1_by_class <- 2 * precision_by_class * recall_by_class / (precision_by_class + recall_by_class)

precision_by_class[is.na(precision_by_class)] <- 0
recall_by_class[is.na(recall_by_class)] <- 0
f1_by_class[is.na(f1_by_class)] <- 0

precision_valid <- mean(precision_by_class)
recall_valid <- mean(recall_by_class)
f1_valid <- mean(f1_by_class)

evaluation_summary <- data.frame(
  Metric = c("Accuracy", "Precision", "Recall", "F1 Score"),
  Value = round(c(acc_valid, precision_valid, recall_valid, f1_valid), 4)
)

evaluation_summary
cm_valid
```
